metadata.description: A personal collection of Claude Code skills, published publicly one by one.

plugins.name: ai-audit
plugins.description: Detect and report AI fingerprints / slop in your projects. Scans copy tells, design patterns, and code habits that AI models default to.

plugins.name: free-image-generation
plugins.description: Generate images for free using multiple AI providers. Supports Cloudflare Workers AI, HuggingFace Inference, and Pollinations.ai with tiered fallback. No API keys required for basic use.
